_meta.purpose: Stage-2 exact-ICD resolution: strict exact-code recall@k PLUS 3 evaluation-only GRADED near-miss metrics that give partial credit for clinically-close misses. graded@k = max similarity of the true code to the top-k predicted codes; graded@k >= strict recall@k by construction.

graded_engine_detail.tfidf: lexical cosine of TF-IDF vectors of the ICD titles (single-char tokens kept so 'hepatitis A' vs 'B' differ)

gemini.note: semantic cosine of cached Gemini title embeddings; high similarity floor -> deltas/ordering matter more than absolute values

tree.note: exact code 1.0 / shared 3-char rollup w_rollup / shared ICD chapter w_chapter / else 0
